title: HOT WEATHER INFORMATION - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH COUNTY HELP FOR WHEN IT'S HOT WEBSITE HOT WEATHER INFORMATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about local hot weather events and sign-ups for community alerts. Information on the temperature thresholds that need to be met for Multnomah County to activate extreme heat cooling spaces can also be found on the website. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Visit Website INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Extreme Heat Advisories/Warnings Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - COOLING SHELTER LOCATOR If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
